DefaultDescriptionFormat.SourceString: A more powerful and refined wardstone, this one allows you a much greater return on investment. When activated, it draws energy from the soul more cleanly and efficiently, reducing the impact of Soulscourge on the user.
DefaultDescriptionFormat.LocalizedString: A more powerful and refined wardstone, this one allows you a much greater return on investment. When activated, it draws energy from the soul more cleanly and efficiently, reducing the impact of Soulscourge on the user.
